Operation 'sendtransactionalemail' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description clarifies: (1) what inputs are expected (TransactionalSendInput schema), (2) what the operation returns (TransactionalSendResponse with specific fields), (3) the immediate action taken (queues for delivery), and (4) distinguishes this from the message creation workflow. This helps agents understand when to use this operation versus creating a message first.

data.current_description: Send a transactional email to a contact or list.
data.description_suggestion: Sends a transactional email to a specified contact or list of contacts. Accepts a TransactionalSendInput object containing recipient information, message content, and delivery parameters. Returns a TransactionalSendResponse with delivery status, message ID, and any processing errors. This operation immediately queues the email for delivery and does not require prior message creation.
data.reasoning: The current description is too brief and lacks critical details for AI agent decision-making. The improved description clarifies: (1) what inputs are expected (TransactionalSendInput schema), (2) what the operation returns (TransactionalSendResponse with specific fields), (3) the immediate action taken (queues for delivery), and (4) distinguishes this from the message creation workflow. This helps agents understand when to use this operation versus creating a message first.

message: Operation 'getemailactivitymetrics' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. The current summary is generic and doesn't convey the analytical nature of the operation. The current description mentions filtering options but doesn't explain what metrics are returned or their business value. The improved version: (1) clarifies the types of metrics available (opens, clicks, bounces, unsubscribes), (2) specifies the response format (array of EmailActivityMetric objects), (3) explains the business purpose (campaign performance analysis), and (4) provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation versus other reporting endpoints.

data.current_description: Retrieve email campaign reports. Filter by message_id, date range, recipient tag, or recipient segment.
data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve email campaign activity metrics and statistics
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves aggregated email activity metrics for sent campaigns, including engagement data such as opens, clicks, bounces, and unsubscribes. Supports filtering by message_id, date range (start_date/end_date), recipient tag, or recipient segment to narrow results. Returns an array of EmailActivityMetric objects containing performance statistics for each matching campaign or time period. Useful for analyzing campaign performance and recipient engagement patterns.
data.reasoning: The current summary is generic and doesn't convey the analytical nature of the operation. The current description mentions filtering options but doesn't explain what metrics are returned or their business value. The improved version: (1) clarifies the types of metrics available (opens, clicks, bounces, unsubscribes), (2) specifies the response format (array of EmailActivityMetric objects), (3) explains the business purpose (campaign performance analysis), and (4) provides context for when an AI agent should use this operation versus other reporting endpoints.

data.description_suggestion: Create a new message template with subject, content, and configuration. Accepts MessageInput containing message name, subject, body, and optional settings. data.description_suggestion: Update an existing message's content and configuration. Requires the message ID in the path. Accepts MessageInput with fields to update (subject, body, name, settings). message: Operation 'sendmessage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_input_details, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary uses 'Send' but description says 'Schedule' - clarified to 'Schedule' for accuracy. Description lacks details about inputs (contacts/segments, timing), outputs (job ID, timing), and state transition. Added comprehensive details about what SendMessageInput contains, return structure, and side effects to improve AI agent understanding of this critical workflow operation.

data.description_suggestion: Schedule a draft message for sending to contacts. Requires the message ID in the path. Accepts SendMessageInput specifying target contacts or segments and send timing. Returns SendMessageResponse with send job ID, status, and scheduled send time. Transitions the message from draft to scheduled state. The message will be sent according to the specified schedule.
data.reasoning: Summary uses 'Send' but description says 'Schedule' - clarified to 'Schedule' for accuracy. Description lacks details about inputs (contacts/segments, timing), outputs (job ID, timing), and state transition. Added comprehensive details about what SendMessageInput contains, return structure, and side effects to improve AI agent understanding of this critical workflow operation.

message: Operation 'cancelmessage' has semantic quality issues: vague_description, missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks details about constraints (which message states can be cancelled), return value, and side effects. Added information about state requirements and the state transition to help AI agents understand when this operation is applicable and what happens as a result.

data.current_description: Cancel a message that has been scheduled for sending.
data.description_suggestion: Cancel a message that has been scheduled for sending. Requires the message ID in the path. Only scheduled messages can be cancelled; sent or draft messages cannot be cancelled. Returns a response confirming cancellation status. Transitions the message from scheduled to cancelled state, preventing any further sends.
data.reasoning: Summary is clear and actionable. Description lacks details about constraints (which message states can be cancelled), return value, and side effects. Added information about state requirements and the state transition to help AI agents understand when this operation is applicable and what happens as a result.
